checkpoint_policy: The full run wrote checkpoints/checkpoints.h5 for restart provenance, but the 385 MB HDF5 payload is omitted from git because golden comparison only requires golden/golden.json and spec.json.

quarantined.reason: pre-FJ-01 invalid nonlinear reference (div_b_l2=0.0267, div_u_l2=0.0230 > 1e-2 guard). GPU smoke under the corrected FJ-01 contract CONFIRMS the primitive-b path cannot regenerate this solenoidal: div_b drifts past the 1e-2 guard by t=30 even with correct dealiasing (primitive b evolution does not enforce div b=0 at finite MRI amplitude). Must be regenerated through the vector-potential/curl oracle (representation: vector_potential), which is solenoidal by construction. See production/promotions/fj03_gpu_smoke_findings.md.
